Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I should recap the normative process The process starts with Receive order Then must be Check inventory next After that depending on inventory If sufficient Check inventory Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order If insufficient Check inventory Cancel order Close order Key constraints mentioned Authorize payment must be after Check inventory and before Package items Package items must be after Authorize payment and before Ship order Ship order must be after Package items and never after Cancel Close order is always last No fulfillment steps Package Ship after Cancel

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order This looks perfect for sufficient inventory All steps in order No violations here

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Receive order Check inventory Package items Authorize payment Ship order Close order Here after Check inventory they did Package items before Authorize payment According to the norm Authorize payment must come before Package items So this is a violation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Cancel order Ship order Close order Wait after Check inventory they did Authorize payment But if inventory was insufficient they should have gone to Cancel But here they authorized payment first then canceled

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also after Cancel they did Ship order which is a big no no The norm states that after Cancel you should not have any fulfillment steps like Ship So two violations here

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 4 Receive order Check inventory Cancel order Close order This matches the insufficient inventory path Receive Check Cancel Close No fulfillment steps after Cancel Looks good No violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 5 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Ship order Close order Here after Authorize payment they skipped Package items and went straight to Ship The norm says Package must happen after Authorize and before Ship So Ship without Package is a violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now lets list all violations Case 2 Package before Authorize Case 3 Canceling after Authorize payment and Shipping after Cancel Case 5 Missing Package items between Authorize and Ship
